description: node liveness + identity probe — GET a node's /health; report up/down + chip_sha/mode/runs (portable, read-only)
rules: read-only — one HTTP GET (/health), no mutation
pure urllib: no local cyberware dependency; a fast liveness check, lighter than discover (no catalog)
usage: Looks for the govd: set NODE_URL to target a node (local, or a FLEET node's tailnet address — not loopback); if unset it falls back to $GOVD_URL, else the local node http://127.0.0.1:5773. Output: status.json — up/down + node identity (service/mode/chip_sha/runs) + exec_mode/exod_attached (govd+exod body or cooperative anchor?). Exit 0 iff the node is up.
limitation: Needs a reachable govd node. Reporting only.
